task_completion.description: Log into ArkCase and navigate to the Complaints module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ArkCase dashboard with the user logged in as arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com and the Complaints module open.

task_completion.description: Update the Priority to 'High' for the three overdue dockets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Priority field set to 'High' for the complaint cases associated with Hargrove Industries, Castellan Medical Group, and Meridian Property Trust.

task_completion.description: Update the Status to 'In Progress' for the three overdue dockets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Status field set to 'In Progress' for the complaint cases associated with Hargrove Industries, Castellan Medical Group, and Meridian Property Trust.

task_completion.description: Add the required case note to the three overdue dockets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the exact text 'CONTINUANCE REQUIRED: Hearing date exceeded 60-day regulatory deadline. Docket rescheduling mandatory per ALJ-Admin Rule 4.2.' added to the notes section of Hargrove Industries, Castellan Medical Group, and Meridian Property Trust.

task_completion.description: Do not modify dockets that are within their deadline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show that the complaint cases for Thornfield Education Partners and Verity Healthcare Systems have NOT been modified (no new notes, priority and status remain unchanged).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface to make modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the ArkCase web UI, dropdowns, and text fields, rather than using terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The case note was entered into the actual ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the note text being typed or pasted into the ArkCase 'Notes' or 'Comments' text area, not into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: No other fields or cases were modified outside the scope of the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show no changes to other case metadata (like respondent names or hearing dates) and no modifications to the two current cases.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are 5 total complaint cases. 3 are overdue (Hearing Date before 2025-12-30): Hargrove Industries (2025-10-15), Castellan Medical Group (2025-11-03), and Meridian Property Trust (2025-09-28). 2 are current: Thornfield Education Partners (2026-02-10) and Verity Healthcare Systems (2026-03-05). The required note text is exactly: 'CONTINUANCE REQUIRED: Hearing date exceeded 60-day regulatory deadline. Docket rescheduling mandatory per ALJ-Admin Rule 4.2.' The overdue cases must have Priority set to 'High' and Status set to 'In Progress'. The current cases must remain unmodified.
